text:

Author: matthew

Log:
  Update to 2.0.0.1

  This contains several minor fixes and adds back man pages (like in 1.x
  series).

  This allows us to remove a heavy build dependency on asciidoc toolkit.

  PR:		206206
  Submitted by:	lifanov@mail.lifanov.com (maintainer)
